judge_scores.reasoning: It incorrectly credits Lula with raising the benefit to R$600, which was approved under Bolsonaro via PEC 1/2022 in 2022, with Lula only maintaining the value in 2023.
Incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, when it was actually Bolsonaro via PEC 1/2022 in 2022 under Auxílio Brasil; Lula merely maintained the value.
The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula instead of Bolsonaro, who implemented it in 2022 via PEC 1/2022.
